email_subject: Sollicitatie — Marketing Stagiair(e) Content & Digital Marketing
email_body:
Beste mevrouw, mijnheer,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Marketing Stagiair(e) – Content & Digital Marketing bij Smets Mobility / BMW Group Belux. Als junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, contentcreatie en WordPress bouw ik graag mee aan jullie campagnes.

Bij Episto schrijf ik SEO-teksten, beheer ik websites en analyseer ik prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik gestructureerde data en GEO toe voor zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines. Ik heb feeling voor social media en visuele storytelling, en werk vlot met Canva en video-editing tools. Mijn Nederlands is B1, maar ik ben gemotiveerd om het verder te verbeteren.

Ik ben beschikbaar vanaf februari 2027 voor minstens 12 weken en heb rijbewijs B. Graag voeg ik mijn portfolio toe in een volgend gesprek.

Ik hoop jullie binnenkort te ontmoeten!

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Madam, Sir,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Marketing Intern – Content & Digital Marketing position at Smets Mobility / BMW Group Belux. As a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, content creation, and WordPress, I would love to contribute to your campaigns.

At Episto, I write SEO content, manage websites, and analyze performance using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data and GEO for visibility in AI search engines. I have a feel for social media and visual storytelling, and I work comfortably with Canva and video editing tools. My Dutch is B1, but I am motivated to improve further.

I am available from February 2027 for at least 12 weeks and have a driving license B. I would be happy to share my portfolio in a follow-up conversation.

I look forward to meeting you!

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste mevrouw, mijnheer,

Als junior digital marketer met een passie voor content en technologie, solliciteer ik graag naar de stage Marketing Stagiair(e) – Content & Digital Marketing bij Smets Mobility / BMW Group Belux. Jullie oproep voor een creatieve storyteller die mee wil bouwen aan échte campagnes spreekt me enorm aan.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-websites met Elementor en Astra. Ik analyseer prestaties met SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console, en pas inzichten toe om zichtbaarheid te verbeteren. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data (JSON-LD), entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) – vaardigheden die steeds belangrijker worden in digital marketing.

Jullie stage biedt precies wat ik zoek: hands-on ervaring met contentcreatie, social media, campagnes en analyse. Ik werk graag met Canva en video-editing tools, en ik heb oog voor visuele storytelling. Hoewel mijn Nederlands momenteel B1 is, ben ik vastberaden om dit naar een hoger niveau te tillen – ik volg lessen en oefen dagelijks. Mijn communicatie in het Engels is vloeiend.

Wat mij bijzonder aanspreekt, is jullie no-nonsense mentaliteit en de kans om eigen ideeën live te zien gaan. Ik ben flexibel, hands-on en leergierig, en ik heb rijbewijs B. Vanaf februari 2027 ben ik beschikbaar voor minstens 12 weken.

Ik voeg graag mijn portfolio toe in een gesprek en hoop jullie snel te ontmoeten!

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Madam, Sir,

As a junior digital marketer with a passion for content and technology, I am excited to apply for the Marketing Intern – Content & Digital Marketing position at Smets Mobility / BMW Group Belux. Your call for a creative storyteller who wants to build real campaigns resonates with me.

In my current role at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and build and maintain WordPress websites using Elementor and Astra. I analyze performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console, and apply insights to improve visibility. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) – skills that are increasingly important in digital marketing.

Your internship offers exactly what I am looking for: hands-on experience with content creation, social media, campaigns, and analysis. I enjoy working with Canva and video editing tools, and I have an eye for visual storytelling. Although my Dutch is currently B1, I am determined to improve – I take classes and practice daily. My English communication is fluent.

What particularly appeals to me is your no-nonsense mentality and the opportunity to see my own ideas go live. I am flexible, hands-on, and eager to learn, and I have a driving license B. I am available from February 2027 for at least 12 weeks.

I would be happy to share my portfolio in a conversation and hope to meet you soon!

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Content creation: SEO blog writing, social media content, and website content management (WordPress, Elementor, Canva)
- Digital marketing: on-page SEO, keyword research, performance analysis (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs)
- Social media integration: implemented Instagram/Facebook feeds on mirook.com
- Technical SEO & GEO: structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, llms.txt for AI search visibility
- Hands-on experience with campaign support and reporting; available from February 2027, driving license B
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Content · SEO · GEO
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, SEO, and digital marketing. At Episto, I write keyword-targeted blog content, manage on-page SEO, and build/maintain WordPress websites. On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data and GEO to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search. Skilled in social media content, analytics, and campaign support. Dutch B1, actively improving. Available from February 2027 for a 12-week internship.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: SEO blog writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building (Elementor, Astra), Canva, video-editing
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Digital Marketing: social media content & integration, campaign support, Google Ads
- Analytics & Reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
